---
title: "Fig 4o - brightfield neurite-xcorr (WT genotype)"
output: html_notebook
params:
  genotype: "WT"
  pixel: 0.3243227
  freq: 0.2
  cell_range_start: 11
  cell_range_end: 13
  cell_prefix: "Cell_"
---

<!--
================================================================================
  WRAPPER for Fig 4o, WT genotype.
================================================================================
  Includes the canonical CCF template at:
      ../../templates/fig04o_lyn_live_neurite_xcorr.Rmd

  Parameters supplied above:
    - genotype = "WT"        Metadata label
    - pixel = 0.3243227      pixel-to-um calibration for this imaging session
    - freq = 0.2 Hz          imaging frame frequency
    - cell_range = 11..13    cell indices for the WT cohort (3 cells)
    - cell_prefix = "Cell_"  WT used underscore-prefixed folder names

  Original 2068-line monolithic wrapper refactored 2026-05-12: 99% of the
  body was structurally identical to the KO wrapper; extracted to the
  canonical template. Parameters above capture all 5 real per-genotype
  differences (plus the WT version had a leftover bioimagetools tutorial
  chunk at the top, which is omitted from the template).

  Essentiality: Essential. Pairs with fig04o_lyn_live_neurite_xcorr_ko.Rmd.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/fig04o_lyn_live_neurite_xcorr.Rmd"}
```
